message.content:
Search the oa-server and oa-core codebases at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\ for:

1. The error code "E:105" - find where this is generated. Look in encryption/decryption related code.
2. How names are encrypted/decrypted in the performance (绩效) module
3. The decrypt/encrypt helper functions, especially looking for error handling that produces "[E:105]"
4. Any code related to "花名" (nickname) decryption in performance evaluation context

Be thorough - check oa-core and oa-server both. The directories are:
- D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\
- D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-server\

Focus on finding the root cause of why a name would show as "[E:105]dheFtbqtKDDxeOzoO24hFQ==" instead of the actual name.
